title: Transfection of Endometrial Cells with siRNA
author: Unknown
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.iztcf6n

steps.title: Shortly before transfection, seed 1x 10...
steps.instruction: Shortly before transfection, seed 1x 10 5 cells per well of a 24-wellplate with 0.5 ml appropriate culture medium containing serum.

steps.title: For the short time until transfection,...
steps.instruction: For the short time until transfection, incubate the cells under normal growthconditions (typically 37°C and 5% CO2).

steps.title: Dilute 37
steps.instruction: Dilute 37.5 ng siRNA in 100 μl culture medium without serum (this will givea final siRNAconcentration of 5 nM after adding complexes to cells instep 5). Add 3 μl HiPerFect Transfection Reagent to the diluted siRNA andmix by vortexing.

steps.title: Incubate for 5 min at room...
steps.instruction: Incubate for 5 min at room temperature (20°C) to allow theformation of transfection complexes.

steps.title: Add the complexes drop-wise onto the cells
steps.instruction: Add the complexes drop-wise onto the cells. Gently swirl the plate to ensureuniform distribution of the transfection complexes.

steps.title: Incubate the cells with the transfection...
steps.instruction: Incubate the cells with the transfection complexes under their normalgrowth conditions, and monitor gene silencing after 48h. Changethe medium as required.
